item.title:
philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 2min What a start from Stan Moody!
Wins his first ever frame at the Crucible with an 84 in no
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 2min What a start from Stan Moody!
Wins his first ever frame at the Crucible with an 84 in no time.
The long pots were great, there were a couple to middle that were beauts too.
Means business. 3 35

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 3min Kyren Wilson - Stan Moody
Nerves? What nerves?
The debutant comes flying out of the
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 3min Kyren Wilson - Stan Moody
Nerves? What nerves?
The debutant comes flying out of the blocks with a swift 84 to draw first blood.
Watch live! https:// bit.ly/WSC26Stream 3 95

item.title:
WorldBilliards: WPBSA reposteó World Billiards @WorldBilliards · 6min CAUSIER DEFENDS IRISH OPEN TITLE
David Causier defeated Robert
item.description:
WPBSA reposteó World Billiards @WorldBilliards · 6min CAUSIER DEFENDS IRISH OPEN TITLE
David Causier defeated Robert Hall 702-355 at the SBI Academy in Carlow to win the 2026 World Billiards Irish Open title.
Report
https:// wpbsa.com/causier-defend s-irish-open-title/ … 2 2 61

item.title: Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 8min The Warrior makes his entrance 1 157
item.description: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 8min The Warrior makes his entrance 1 157
